text_zh: AI 总是毁掉故事情节
reply_original: I am truly sorry that the AI is disrupting your storylines. We know how important consistency is for your experience. To help us fix this, please email support@fantachat.ai with your UID and a screenshot of where the AI went wrong. Our team will investigate the logic immediately to improve the AI's memory and narrative flow.
reply_zh: 对于 AI 干扰了您的故事情节，我深表歉意。我们深知连贯性对您的体验有多么重要。为了帮助我们解决这个问题，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，并附上您的 UID 以及 AI 出错处的截图。我们的团队将立即调查相关逻辑，以改进 AI 的记忆力和叙事流畅度。
